metadata.title: Code Blue: Midnight Shift
metadata.author: AdventureKit Studio
metadata.summary: A pitchable emergency-room thriller about a night team uncovering why a patient is crashing before the hospital buries the truth.

storyBible.premise: During the last hour of a storm-battered night shift, a trauma team must stabilize a patient whose symptoms point to a hidden poisoning and a hospital coverup.
storyBible.targetPlayStyle: dialogue, triage choices, procedure hooks, evidence cross-checks
storyBible.visualDirection: amber task lights, teal monitors, rain-black glass, compressed medical spaces
pacingRules: Alternate bedside emotion with diagnostic focus
Let every hook change the handoff
worldRules: A missed clue changes the ending
storyBible.coreMystery: The patient was given a medication that should never have reached the ward.
storyBible.writingStyleGuide: Short urgent lines, clinical specificity, emotion under pressure.

characters.biography: A physician who turns panic into steps people can follow.
characters.secrets: He once signed a transfer too early.
characters.motivations: Keep this patient from becoming another preventable loss.
characters.visualDescription: Forties, dark scrub jacket, tired eyes, badge clipped crooked.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Cinematic emergency physician portrait, amber trauma bay light, teal monitor glow, no text.
characters.relationshipNotes: Trusted by Mara, challenged by Sato.

variants.description: Hale reads a failing rhythm strip.
variants.imagePrompt: Emergency physician studying monitor strip under amber light.

characters.biography: She knows which rooms are lying before the chart does.
characters.secrets: She filed a prior medication safety warning that vanished.
characters.motivations: Protect the team and the patient.
characters.visualDescription: Navy scrubs, tied-back hair, radio on shoulder.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Charge nurse in cinematic trauma bay, focused, amber and cyan lighting.
characters.voiceNotes: Clipped, practical, warm when it matters.

variants.description: Mara prepares the room for a decisive intervention.
variants.imagePrompt: Charge nurse ready with procedure kit in rainlit hospital bay.

characters.biography: A resident whose confidence keeps arriving a second late.
characters.secrets: He missed the first allergy flag.
characters.motivations: Prove he belongs without hurting anyone.
characters.visualDescription: Young doctor, wrinkled coat, tablet held too tightly.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Young medical resident in tense emergency room, teal screen light, no text.

variants.description: Niko catches a hidden chart mismatch.
variants.imagePrompt: Resident reading tablet with realization in emergency bay.

characters.biography: A city inspector whose collapse threatens powerful people.
characters.motivations: Survive long enough to tell the truth.
characters.visualDescription: Older patient under oxygen mask, work jacket folded nearby.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Cinematic patient in emergency room, vulnerable, dramatic monitor glow.

variants.imagePrompt: Emergency patient on stretcher, cinematic teal monitors, no gore.
variants.usageNotes: Use only during high stakes scenes.

characters.biography: An administrator who knows which failures become headlines.
characters.secrets: She approved the rushed medication vendor.
characters.motivations: Keep the hospital alive, even if the truth bends.
characters.visualDescription: Tailored coat over scrubs, immaculate badge, guarded stare.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Hospital administrator in dark corridor, polished, tense, cinematic.

variants.description: Sato shuts down a line of inquiry.
variants.imagePrompt: Polished hospital administrator in dim emergency corridor.

characters.biography: A daughter who noticed the wrong pill bottle before anyone believed her.
characters.secrets: She took a photo of the medication tray.
characters.motivations: Make the team see her father as a person.
characters.visualDescription: Raincoat, shaking hands, phone clutched like evidence.
characters.baseImagePrompt: Worried daughter in hospital hallway rainlight, cinematic teal and amber.

variants.imagePrompt: Worried daughter holding phone evidence in hospital corridor.

items.name: Portable Monitor Strip
items.description: A clipped rhythm strip from the hallway monitor.

items.name: Family Medication List
items.description: Sofia's handwritten list with one circled bottle.

items.name: Vendor Label
items.description: A substitute medication label that should not be in the ward.

assets.title: Bay Seven
assets.description: Amber-lit emergency bay during a storm.
assets.prompt: Cinematic emergency trauma bay at midnight, amber task lights, teal monitors, rain-black windows, premium visual novel background, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Family Window
assets.description: Rainlit hallway where Sofia gives the missing list.
assets.prompt: Hospital hallway beside rain-streaked window, vending light, anxious daughter, cinematic noir medical drama, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Medication Station
assets.prompt: Hospital medication workstation with glowing scanner, paper chart, storm outside, amber and cyan cinematic light, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Imaging Hall
assets.description: Cold corridor between diagnosis and transfer.
assets.prompt: Empty hospital imaging corridor at night, cold blue light, wet footprints, cinematic thriller, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Airway Cart
assets.description: Crash cart and airway kit under stark procedure light.
assets.prompt: Hospital emergency airway cart open under amber procedure light, sterile tools arranged, teal monitors beyond, cinematic medical thriller, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Roof Transfer
assets.description: Stormy hospital roof transfer pad at dawn.
assets.prompt: Hospital roof transfer pad in stormy blue dawn, emergency team silhouettes, wet concrete, cinematic thriller background, 16:9, no text.

assets.title: Monitor Strip
assets.description: Evidence image prompt for rhythm strip.
assets.prompt: Fictional medical monitor rhythm strip on thermal paper, no readable real patient data, cinematic prop.

assets.title: Family Medication List
assets.prompt: Fictional handwritten medication list on folded paper, no real brand names, cinematic prop closeup.
assets.negativePrompt: real drug brands, real patient names

assets.title: Vendor Label
assets.prompt: Fictional hospital supply label with generic symbols, no readable brand, noir medical evidence prop.

gameplayHooks.title: Rapid Assessment
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: The team must decide what signal matters before the patient crashes.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Sequence airway, rhythm, pressure, and escalation steps.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Choose the stabilizing order under time pressure.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Vitals left, action queue center, timer right.
gameplayHooks.mobileGestureNotes: Tap ordered steps; no drag required.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Can be built as timed step sequencing.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a rapid assessment sequence for a medical thriller prototype.

gameplayHooks.title: Medication Reconciliation
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Find the pill list contradiction that explains the collapse.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Compare family notes, chart, and supply labels.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Match the family list against the substitute label.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Evidence compare board with three large cards.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Create a medication reconciliation evidence hook spec.

gameplayHooks.title: Photo on Sofia's Phone
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Let the player notice the wrong tray label.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Inspect a phone photo and select the label.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Phone image center with zoom buttons.

gameplayHooks.title: Airway Kit Setup
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Mara prepares a clean intervention path.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Draft an object manipulation hook for airway setup.

gameplayHooks.title: Administrator in the Hall
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Sato pressures Hale to transfer early.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Pick a response before patience drops.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Two large response cards with countdown.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Design a timed authority challenge hook.

gameplayHooks.title: Transfer Brief Builder
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Build the handoff that saves the patient upstairs.
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Select the most important evidence for the receiving team.
gameplayHooks.successCondition: Brief includes rhythm, med list, vendor label.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Create a transfer brief evidence hook.

gameplayHooks.title: Catch the Clean Rhythm
gameplayHooks.gameplayPurpose: Tap clean beats as the trace stabilizes.
gameplayHooks.uiLayoutNotes: Large rhythm strip with safe tap zones.
gameplayHooks.agentPrompt: Spec a rhythm precision hook for monitor reading.

gameplayHooks.title: Earn Sofia's Trust
gameplayHooks.narrativePurpose: Sofia decides whether to share the phone photo.
gameplayHooks.expectedPlayerAction: Choose responses that acknowledge fear and ask specific questions.
gameplayHooks.implementationNotes: Can later become a tone-aware dialogue module.

scenes.title: Bay Seven Alert
scenes.purpose: Open with clinical urgency and a patient whose story does not fit.
scenes.synopsis: The team receives Eli Voss as monitors stutter under storm light.
scenes.camera: wide 16:9 bay frame, patient center, team crossing foreground
scenes.background: A trauma bay under amber task lights, privacy curtains moving with every urgent step.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Cinematic emergency trauma bay at midnight, amber task lights, teal monitor glow, rain-black windows, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: 16:9 bay stage, dialogue lower third, choices as wide cards.

blocks.text: The midnight board flashes red before the ambulance crew reaches the doors.

blocks.speaker: Mara Chen
blocks.text: New admit in Bay Seven. Vitals are noisy, family is scared, and the resident is still three halls away.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Hale
blocks.text: Then the room is ours until it is not. Give me the first clean signal.

scenes.title: First Read
scenes.purpose: Introduce the first procedure hook and the monitor clue.
scenes.synopsis: The team tries to separate rhythm from artifact.
scenes.camera: close monitor foreground, team blurred behind
scenes.background: The monitor throws pale green peaks across a reflective wall clock.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Close cinematic view of emergency monitor strip, amber bay reflections, tense medical thriller, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Vitals left, hook card center, evidence rail collapsed.

blocks.text: The rhythm is almost readable, then skids into artifact as the stretcher brake squeals.

scenes.title: Family Window
scenes.purpose: Humanize the stakes and unlock Sofia's evidence.
scenes.synopsis: Sofia describes the new pill bottle and decides whether to trust the team.
scenes.background: A quiet strip outside the bay where vending-machine light catches rain on the glass.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Hospital hallway beside rain-streaked window, anxious daughter with phone, vending light, cinematic noir medical drama.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Character portrait right, dialogue lower third, trust choices wide.

blocks.speaker: Sofia Lane
blocks.text: He took the new pills after dinner. He said the room sounded underwater.

choices.label: Bring the list back to the team

scenes.title: Photo on the Phone
scenes.purpose: Introduce visual inspection and the vendor label.
scenes.synopsis: Sofia reveals a photo of the tray that should have been deleted.
scenes.background: A phone screen glows with a tray photo while rain runs down the window behind it.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Closeup of phone evidence in hospital hallway, reflected rain, fictional medication tray, no real brands.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Phone image center with inspection hook controls.

blocks.text: The label on the tray is not the one in the chart.

scenes.title: Pressure Drop
scenes.purpose: Show the cost of a failed procedure read.
scenes.synopsis: The bay gets louder as the patient's pressure falls.
scenes.camera: handheld-feeling close frame, alarms reflected in glass
scenes.background: The bay narrows into overlapping alarms and hard fluorescent edges.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Emergency bay alarm state, red alert light, teal monitor glow, tense cinematic no gore.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Hale
blocks.text: We missed something. Find the contradiction before the next minute takes it from us.

choices.label: Rebuild the plan from medication clues

scenes.title: Medication Crosscheck
scenes.synopsis: The team compares the strip, family list, and supply label.
scenes.camera: overhead evidence board with monitors behind
scenes.background: A workstation balanced between the family note, rhythm strip, and patient bay.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Hospital medication workstation with evidence cards, amber teal light, cinematic thriller, no readable real data.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Three evidence cards center, hook card below.

blocks.speaker: Mara Chen
blocks.text: One clue says rhythm. One clue says medication. Pick the one that explains both.

scenes.title: Airway Kit
scenes.synopsis: Mara lays out tools as Niko steadies his hands.
scenes.camera: tool tray foreground, patient blurred center
scenes.background: A sterile kit opens under a cone of amber light.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Emergency procedure kit on tray, amber light, teal monitor bokeh, no gore, no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Tool tray hook centered with large tap targets.

scenes.title: Imaging Delay
scenes.purpose: Move pressure out of the bay and into the institution.
scenes.synopsis: The imaging hallway is empty and the elevator is locked down.
scenes.background: The imaging hall waits cold and blue behind a locked elevator.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Empty hospital imaging corridor, locked elevator, cold blue light, wet footprints, cinematic thriller.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Long corridor background with objective rail.

blocks.speaker: Niko Reyes
blocks.text: The chart says this elevator was never locked. The building says otherwise.

scenes.title: Sato Blocks the Hall
scenes.synopsis: Dr. Sato urges an early transfer before the evidence is clean.
scenes.background: Dr. Sato stands between the team and the elevator controls.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Hospital administrator blocking dim imaging corridor, cold blue elevator light, cinematic no text.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Sato portrait right, timed choice hook center.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Sato
blocks.text: You have enough to transfer, Dr. Hale. Do not confuse caution with heroism.

scenes.title: Vendor Trail
scenes.synopsis: The substitute label points to a rushed vendor order.
scenes.background: A scanner reads the substitute label while the bay waits behind glass.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Hospital scanner reading fictional supply label, teal beam, amber shadows, no real logos.

blocks.speaker: Mara Chen
blocks.text: This label bypassed pharmacy review. Someone made a shortcut look like a protocol.

scenes.title: Safe Handoff
scenes.purpose: Turn evidence into a lifesaving handoff.
scenes.synopsis: The team condenses the night into the exact brief the receiving team needs.
scenes.camera: team in profile, elevator doors beyond
scenes.background: The bay settles into a lower register, alarms replaced by measured instructions.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Emergency team preparing patient transfer, calm after crisis, amber teal cinematic light.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Handoff hook center, evidence rail open.

blocks.speaker: Dr. Hale
blocks.text: That is the version of the night that makes it to morning.

choices.label: Send the patient upstairs with the right story

scenes.title: Uncertain Handoff
scenes.purpose: Failure branch that remains playable and dramatic.
scenes.synopsis: The patient survives the bay but the reason stays unresolved.
scenes.camera: elevator doors closing on worried team
scenes.background: The transfer elevator opens onto a colder, quieter floor.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Hospital transfer elevator, cold quiet floor, unresolved medical thriller mood, 16:9.

blocks.text: The patient survives the bay, but the missing reason follows the chart upstairs.

choices.label: Log the miss and brief the morning team

scenes.title: Roof Transfer
scenes.synopsis: A storm helicopter waits as the team decides how much truth to send with Eli.
scenes.background: The roof is all wind, rotor wash, and the first gray line of morning.
scenes.backgroundPrompt: Rain-swept hospital roof transfer at dawn, emergency team silhouettes, cinematic teal amber, no logos.

layoutNotes.mobileLandscape: Wide roof stage, final choice cards.

blocks.text: Morning arrives like a verdict no one has finished writing.

endings.title: Safe Transfer
endings.summary: The team turns scattered signals into a clean handoff and Eli leaves the bay with the right care plan and the first thread of the coverup.
endings.cinematicNotes: Elevator light warms as alarms fade.

endings.title: The Hard Lesson
endings.summary: Eli survives the night, but the team carries the cost of a rushed read into the next shift.
endings.cinematicNotes: Morning board fills with new names.

endings.title: Uncertain Transfer
endings.summary: The patient moves upstairs with enough to live, not enough to expose the mistake.
endings.cinematicNotes: The vendor label remains under a chart clip.

endings.title: Quiet Cover
endings.summary: The hospital gets its clean report, but Mara keeps Sofia's photo and a promise.
endings.cinematicNotes: Sato watches the roof doors close.
